name: Pineapple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the cool whip.
2. Mix 1/3 cup lemon juice into 1 can of condensed sweetened milk until it reaches a consistency similar to sour cream.
3. Stir the milk mixture into the cooled cool whip.
4. Add the crushed pineapple.
5. Allow the salad to chill in the refrigerator for half an hour.
